title: Rescinded guidance documents

sections.full_text:
Maintaining guidance documents that no longer align with their purpose may result in ineffective use of resources. Rescinding such guidance documents enables both OSFI and industry to focus on the right risks in a timely manner. Find out more about the background of this initiative .
Please contact information@osfi-bsif.gc.ca if you require a copy of a rescinded guidance document for reference purposes.

sections.heading: List of rescinded guidance documents
sections.full_text:
Guidance documents listed in the following table have been identified as outdated, redundant, or no longer well-aligned with our mandate. They will be rescinded and removed from the website by the specified effective rescission date.
Title | Type | Rescinded
B-1 Prudent Person Approach (1993) | Guideline | April 1, 2025
B-2 Investment Concentration Limit for Property and Casualty Insurance Companies (1994) | Guideline | April 1, 2025
B-3 Sound Reinsurance Practices and Procedures (2010) | Guideline | April 1, 2025
B-3 Classification of Loans Guaranteed by a Parent of the Bank (1991) | Guideline | April 1, 2025
Capital Disclosure Requirements (revised 2018) | Guideline | April 1, 2025
D-11 Public Disclosure Requirements for Domestic Systemically Important Banks on Liquidity Coverage Ratio (2014) | Guideline | April 1, 2025
D-12 Leverage Ratio Disclosure Requirements (2018) | Guideline | April 1, 2025
Data Maintenance at TSA & AMA Institutions (Implementation Note) (2006) | Advisory | April 1, 2025
Deferral of IFRS 9 Application for Federally Regulated Life Insurers (2017) | Advisory | April 1, 2025
E-5 Retention/Destruction of Records (1993) | Guideline | April 1, 2025
External Audit Quality Initiatives – Deposit-taking Institutions (2014) | Advisory | April 1, 2025
External Audit Quality Initiatives – Insurers (2014) | Advisory | April 1, 2025
Global systemically important banks – Public disclosure requirements (2021) | Advisory | April 1, 2025
IFRS 17 Transition and Progress Report Requirements for Federally Regulated Insurers (2018) | Advisory | April 1, 2025
Oversight Expectations for TSA & AMA Institutions (2006) | Advisory | April 1, 2025
Revised Guidance for Companies that Determine Segregated Fund Guarantee Capital Requirements Using an Approved Model (2010) | Advisory | April 1, 2025
Securitization – Large Exposure Issues Pertaining to Liquidity Support Facilities (2005) | Advisory | April 1, 2025
Supplementary Information for Life Insurance Companies that Determine Segregated Fund Guarantee Capital Requirements Using an Approved Model (2009) | Advisory | April 1, 2025
Supplementary Guidance for the Treatment of Participating Insurance in Guideline A: LICAT (2020) | Advisory | April 1, 2025
Value-at-Risk (VaR) Models Validation and Approvals of Model Modifications Capital Adequacy Requirements, Guideline A, Part II (Guidance Note 2001) | Advisory | April 1, 2025
Alternative Method for Life Insurance Companies that Determine the Segregated Fund Guarantee Capital Requirement Using Prescribed Factors | Advisory | December 31, 2025
Asset Securitization - (2018) | Guideline Impact Analysis Statement | December 31, 2025
B-12 Interest Rate Risk Management –(2019) | Guideline Impact Analysis Statement | December 31, 2025
B-2 Large Exposure Limits (D-SIBs) – (2019) | Guideline Impact Analysis Statement | December 31, 2025
Background Checks on Directors and Senior Management of FREs - (2008) | Guideline Impact Analysis Statement | December 31, 2025
Background Checks on Directors and Senior Management of FREs - (2008) | Letter | December 31, 2025
Breaking down Basel III | Backgrounder | December 31, 2025
Capital treatment of BDC Guarantee under the Highly Affected Sectors Credit Availability Program | Letter | December 31, 2025
Derivatives Sound Practices - (2014) | Guideline Impact Analysis Statement | December 31, 2025
Earthquake Exposure Sound Practices - (2013) | Guideline Impact Analysis Statement | December 31, 2025
Enterprise-Wide Model Risk Management Guideline - (2017) | Guideline Impact Analysis Statement | December 31, 2025
Enterprise-Wide Model Risk Management Guideline - (2017 | Letter | December 31, 2025
Foreign Bank Branch Deposit Requirement Guideline (Guideline A-10) | Guideline Impact Analysis Statement | December 31, 2025
Guide to Intervention for Federally Regulated Deposit-Taking Institutions | Letter | December 31, 2025
Guide to Intervention for Federally Regulated Life Insurance Companies | Letter | December 31, 2025
Guideline B-11 on Pledging | Letter | December 31, 2025
Internal Model Oversight Framework - (2019) | Guideline Impact Analysis Statement | December 31, 2025
Leverage Requirements Guideline – (2023) | Guideline Impact Analysis Statement | December 31, 2025
Liquidity Adequacy Requirements (LAR) Guideline – (2019) | Guideline Impact Analysis Statement | December 31, 2025
Liquidity Principles Guideline (B-6) - (2019) | Guideline Impact Analysis Statement | December 31, 2025
Materiality Criteria for Related Party Transactions – (2008) | Guideline Impact Analysis Statement | December 31, 2025
Net Stable Funding Ratio Disclosure Requirements – (2019) | Guideline Impact Analysis Statement | December 31, 2025
OSFI Update to COVID-19 related regulatory flexibility for the covered bond limit | Letter | December 31, 2025
OSFI's Near-Term Plan of Prudential Policy for Federally Regulated Financial Institutions and Federally Regulated Private Pension Plans | Letter | December 31, 2025
OSFI's Review of Reputation Risk Practices - Principles, Observations and Next Steps – (2005) | Discussion paper | December 31, 2025
OSFI's Review of Reputation Risk Practices - Principles, Observations and Next Steps – (2005) | Letter | December 31, 2025
Recognition of Hedge Contracts in the Determination of the Segregated Fund Guarantee Capital Requirement for Life Insurance Companies | Advisory | December 31, 2025
Regulatory Compliance Management – (2014) | Guideline Impact Analysis Statement | December 31, 2025
Stress Testing - (2009) | Guideline Impact Analysis Statement | December 31, 2025
Total Loss Absorbing Capacity (TLAC) Disclosure Requirements Guideline and Capital Disclosure Requirements Guideline – (2018) | Guideline Impact Analysis Statement | December 31, 2025
Total Loss Absorbing Capacity (TLAC) Guideline - (2018) | Guideline Impact Analysis Statement | December 31, 2025
